zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor FitzAlan於1284年8月10日出生在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素時，她的父親Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel17歲，母親Countess Alesia di Saluzzo15歲。她於大約1297年與Sir Henry de Percy在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1328年8月在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾貝弗利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor FitzAlan于1284年8月10日出生在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素时，她的父亲Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel17岁，母亲Countess Alesia di Saluzzo15岁。她于大约1297年与Sir Henry de Percy在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1328年8月在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾貝弗利。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor FitzAlan was born on 10 August 1284, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, her father, Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel, was 17 and her mother, Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, was 15. She married Sir Henry de Percy about 1297, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in August 1328, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor FitzAlan est née le 10 août 1284, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry de Percy environ 1297, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en août 1328, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor FitzAlan am 10. August 1284 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel 17 und ihre Mutter Countess Alesia di Saluzzo 15. Sie hat um 1297 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England Sir Henry de Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im August 1328 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor FitzAlan è nata il il 10 agosto 1284 nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, sua padre, Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry de Percy circa 1297, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel agosto 1328, nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Beverley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor FitzAlanが1284年8月10日にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルで生まれた時，父Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundelは17歳，母Countess Alesia di Saluzzoは15歳であった。約1297年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでSir Henry de Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1328年8月にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor FitzAlan(이)가 1284년 8월 10일 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Alesia di Saluzzo(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1297년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 Sir Henry de Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 베벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor FitzAlan nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1284, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry de Percy aproximadamente 1297, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1328, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor FitzAlan родилась 10 августа 1284 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard FitzAlan 8th Earl of Arundel было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Alesia di Saluzzo, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry de Percy около 1297 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла август 1328 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Henry de Percy aproximadamente 1297, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en agosto de 1328, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
